elements.sent-2411-001: We present an exact solution to standard model hydrodynamic cosmological perturbation theory in a matter-dominated era that is taken to be adiabatic.
elements.sent-2411-002: The solution is in the form of hypergeometric functions.
elements.sent-2411-003: While such functions can oscillate they do not appear to oscillate with the acoustic sound velocity.
elements.sent-2411-004: We show that for the model the hydrodynamic assumption is only valid at low frequencies, with viscous effects being needed in order to maintain the covariant conservation of the perturbed energy-momentum tensor.
elements.sent-2411-005: A central interest of cosmological research is the study of cosmological fluctuations around a homogeneous and isotropic cosmic microwave background (see e.g. \cite{Dodelson2003,Mukhanov2005,Weinberg2008,Lyth2009,Ellis2012 ).}
